zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Beaumont於大約1102年出生在英國藍卡爾時，他的父親Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick57歲，母親Marguerite Perche24歲。他於1135年之前與Gundred de Warenne結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1153年6月12日在英國瓦維其可爾沃里克享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Beaumont于大约1102年出生在英国藍卡爾时，他的父亲Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick57岁，母亲Marguerite Perche24岁。他于1135年之前与Gundred de Warenne结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1153年6月12日在英国瓦維其可爾沃里克享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
English (Kent): variant of   Beaumont  .
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Siegmund.
German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): variant of   Beaumont  .
Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Beaumont was born about 1102, in Lancashire, England, his father, Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick, was 57 and his mother, Marguerite Perche, was 24. He married Gundred de Warenne before 1135. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 12 June 1153, in Warwick, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Beaumont est né environ 1102, à Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Marguerite Perche, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Gundred de Warenne avant 1135. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 12 juin 1153, à Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Beaumont um 1102 in Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick 57 und seine Mutter Marguerite Perche 24. Er hat vor 1135 Gundred de Warenne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 12. Juni 1153 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Warwick, Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Beaumont è nato il circa 1102 nel Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick, aveva 57 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite Perche, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Gundred de Warenne prima del 1135. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 12 giugno 1153, nel Warwick, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Beaumontが約1102年にイギリスランカシュアイアで生まれた時，父Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwickは57歳，母Marguerite Percheは24歳であった。1135年以前にGundred de Warenneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1153年6月12日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアワーウィックで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Beaumont(이)가 대략 1102년 영국 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite Perche(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1135년 이전 Gundred de Warenne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1153년 6월 12일 영국 워윅실르 워윅에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Beaumont nasceu aproximadamente 1102, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite Perche, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Gundred de Warenne antes 1135. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 12 de junho de 1153, em Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Beaumont родился около 1102 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite Perche, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Gundred de Warenne перед 1135 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 12 июня 1153 г. в местности варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de Beaumont nació aproximadamente 1102, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Beaumont 1st Earl of Warwick, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Marguerite Perche, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Gundred de Warenne antes de 1135. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 12 de junio de 1153, en Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años.
